mapper.select:
SELECT r.id, r.dorm_id, r.dorm_name, r.name, r.area, r.status, r.gender, d.type AS dorm_type, d.region AS dorm_region, d.layout AS dorm_layout FROM room_info r LEFT JOIN dorm_info d ON d.id = r.dorm_id AND d.is_deleted = 0
ORDER BY r.dorm_id ASC, r.id ASC LIMIT #{pageSize} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(r.id) FROM room_info r LEFT JOIN dorm_info d ON d.id = r.dorm_id AND d.is_deleted = 0
SELECT id, dorm_id, dorm_name, name, area, status, gender, is_deleted, create_time, update_time FROM room_info WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
mapper.update: UPDATE room_info SET status = #{status}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(id) FROM room_info WHERE dorm_id = #{dormId} AND status = 'occupied' AND is_deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(id) FROM room_info WHERE dorm_id = #{dormId} AND is_deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(id) FROM room_info WHERE is_deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(id) FROM room_info WHERE status = 'occupied' AND is_deleted = 0
